_comment: Post-125000 V2 (nonce-bound seed) bit-equivalence reference for btx-gbt-solve. Generated 2026-06-08 from the production v0.32.2 Linux solver (sha256 b9251a06133abb90...) via the CPU backend at --solver-threads 1. block_height=130000 is past nMatMulNonceSeedHeight (125000), so this exercises the SolveMatMulNonceSeeded path (per-nonce DeterministicMatMulSeedV2). MUST use --solver-threads 1: the parallel solver fans the nonce range across threads non-deterministically, so multi-threaded runs find a different first nonce. nonce_start=0 + loose share_target => nonce 0 wins deterministically. Any correctly built solver (Linux, or macOS CPU/Metal) must reproduce expected.matmul_digest.
